summary: Two-change poll. chg-001 (HIGH) extends the PRED-105 silent-ignore pattern from 10 -> 11 consecutive polls and the manual-commit drought from ~7.16d -> ~7.65d (sustained ~12h past the FAIL-009 pre-locked 7-day threshold; the threshold-CROSSING event was actually at the 2026-04-24T15:53Z poll). chg-002 (LOW) is routine auto-pipeline rollup with no canary, parameter, or load-bearing-page drift. The genuinely new diagnostic question — whether today's ECM Daily Review auto-regen at ~07:12Z holds 94.5/69/10/4 (4th consecutive pipeline-canonical silent-ignore) or moves refined 4 -> 5 (post-hoc adjudication) — was not yet observable at poll time (~3.5h before the expected regen).

changes.kernel_of_truth: PRED-105 itself rests on a real research area: bioelectromagnetics literature documents small (<5%, replication-troubled) effects of weak static fields and PEMF on plant growth. A 14-day cucumber-growth study is an actual experimental form, and the dome's SHA-256 pre-registration (anchor 3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490) does prevent text-level goalpost-moving. Charitable reading: the author may be collecting late-arriving data and has not yet decided how to score it; biological replication takes time. Counter: at ~7.16 days post-window-close with no acknowledgement, no "data collection extended to YYYY" note, and zero manual commits across 12 consecutive auto-only commits spanning 7.65 days, the data-still-arriving reading becomes harder to sustain. The pipeline-level fact is structural, not interpretive: build_daily_review.py (last touched 2026-04-17 a57e731) keys off explicit FALSIFIED labels and has no concept of window-expired-without-adjudication, so each daily auto-regen will continue to hold registry_ratio_pct=94.5 indefinitely.
changes.forensic_timeline: Last manual commit a57e731 (2026-04-17T12:02:38Z) is now ~183.7h / 7.65 days old, across 12 consecutive polls of auto-only activity. 12 commits in the 11.9h since the prior poll (2026-04-24T15:53:00Z) were 100% automated: 10x "Auto-update ECM status" GitHub Action between 16:40Z and 03:26Z, plus 2x "auto: ECM data pull" ECM Auto-Pipeline (18:35Z, 01:18Z). Today's ECM Daily Review auto-regen has NOT yet fired — expected ~07:12Z based on prior three days (07:06Z 22 Apr, 07:09Z 23 Apr, 07:12Z 24 Apr). proofs/ unchanged (still 6 files, weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json still missing its .ots companion across 12 polls). monitor.py last touched 2026-04-05 8e4bf9b, scripts/build_daily_review.py last touched 2026-04-17 a57e731 — neither has changed.

review_state_crossref.canary_traps: opentimestamps-provenance: active, NOT triggered. No predictions_only.json, no commit messages mentioning provenance/separate-predictions, no monitor.py changes separating prediction params from audit results.
review_state_crossref.parameter_canary: All 6 baselines unchanged (disc_radius 20015 km, H(0) 8537 km, lambda_g 8619 km, sun 5733 km, moon 2534 km, refraction coefficient 0.20).
review_state_crossref.verdict_tally: No verdict-impact: PRED-105 our_verdict already silent_ignore (set 2026-04-20).

current_review_text_affected.FAIL_009_outcome: Outcome field currently states "10 consecutive polls; predictions.html byte-identical across the most recent 9 polls (md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785); ~171.8h / 7.16d old; 11 consecutive polls of auto-only commits." Now stale by one poll: actual is 11 / 10 / ~183.7h (7.65d) / 12. Optional small refresh — see recommended_actions[0].
current_review_text_affected.FAIL_009_algorithmic_dimension: Counter still says "3 as of 2026-04-24T07:12:42Z". Today's 07:12Z auto-regen has not yet fired, so this remains accurate. Do not bump until poll after ~07:12Z observes the 4th regen.
current_review_text_affected.ISS_1423_open: Description from 2026-04-24T19:26Z says "10 consecutive polls (~6.66 days)" and "manual-commit drought crossed 7 days (~7.16 days as of 2026-04-24T15:53Z)." Now stale: actual is 11 polls / ~7.16 days / drought ~7.65d. Pattern is the same; numbers are bumpable. Optional refresh.

changes.strategic_assessment: No infrastructure or methodology change. The author has not edited monitor.py, build_daily_review.py, methodology.json, or any load-bearing HTML in the past ~11.9 hours; predictions.html itself is byte-identical across 10 consecutive polls. The strategic posture is "hold and emit": the auto-pipeline keeps churning out 94.5% with PRED-105 still labeled PENDING, and no human action breaks that. This is not responsive to our review; it is the absence of any response. The genuinely interesting next datapoint is the ~07:12Z auto-regen (about 3.5h after this poll) — if refined moves 4 -> 5 it indicates someone wired a window-expiry rule into the pipeline (responsive); if it holds 4, the silent-ignore extends to a 4th consecutive pipeline-canonical regen (continuation).
counter_arguments_per_user_preference: A 7.65-day manual-commit gap spanning a weekend is not anomalous in isolation for a personal project; the author has previously shipped large batches (e.g. 2026-04-17 shipped 3 manual commits in ~25 minutes after a comparable gap).
Bioelectromagnetics replication legitimately takes weeks beyond nominal study end — measurement, statistics, write-up. Absence of a Day-7-post-window verdict is not by itself a methodological tell.

The dome's SHA-256 anchoring of the prediction text DOES bind him to the original prompt and outcome metric — there is a real cost to a goalpost-move that did not exist before that mechanism was added.

Opposing read: the silent-ignore is structural (build_daily_review.py logic), not authorial-choice — so the rate-parity of auto-commits and the byte-identical predictions.html together establish the pipeline is healthy and live, and silent-ignore is what the LIVE system is choosing to emit, not a stalled service.

recommended_actions.detail: Bump stat figures from "10 consecutive polls / 9 byte-identical / ~171.8h (7.16d) / 11 consecutive auto-only" to "11 consecutive polls / 10 byte-identical / ~183.7h (7.65d) / 12 consecutive auto-only". Do NOT bump algorithmic_dimension counter (still 3; 4th auto-regen has not yet fired).
recommended_actions.rationale: Keeps canonical failure ledger current. Single-field text patch, low collision risk. Could equally be done by next poll-driven update.

recommended_actions.detail: Update from "10 consecutive polls (~6.66 days)" / "crossed 7 days (~7.16 days)" / "byte-identical across 9 polls" to "11 consecutive polls (~7.16 days)" / "sustained ~12h past 7-day threshold (~7.65 days)" / "byte-identical across 10 polls".
recommended_actions.rationale: Keeps open issue text accurate. Decider may prefer to leave the existing issue and let a single supersede happen on a more material event.

recommended_actions.detail: The 07:12Z window is the high-information event. Specifically watch: (a) registry counts 69/10/4 -> 69/10/5 OR 69/9/5 means responsive adjudication (CRITICAL — flag canary-adjacent if accompanied by a new methodology note); (b) counts hold 69/10/4 means 4th consecutive pipeline-canonical silent-ignore (substantive continuation); (c) any goalpost-move on PRED-105 window text from "April 18, 2026 (14-day window)" to "April 2026" / "ongoing" / a wider date (CRITICAL); (d) any manual commit by Nhughes09 (substantive minimum, parameter and canary diff required).
recommended_actions.rationale: Pre-arms the next analyst run with a clear branch decision.

gotchas: Do not double-count threshold-crossing: it occurred at the 2026-04-24T15:53Z poll (171.8h passed 168h). This poll sustains, not crosses.
Do not bump FAIL-009.algorithmic_dimension consecutive counter (still 3) — today's regen has not fired yet.

Two analyst runs raced this morning (03:47Z and 04:00Z); 04:00Z was a no-op. The 04:00Z latest-analysis-summary documents the race. Confirm next prelude that origin/main is fresh before any clone reads.
